entries: The deathwalker lets out a terrifying roar. Each creature within 120 feet of the deathwalker that can hear it must succeed on a DC 23 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature that fails its initial saving throw by 5 or more is paralyzed while frightened in this way. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

bonus.name: Must Go Fast.
entries: The deathwalker moves up to its speed toward a hostile creature that it can see.

bonus.name: Tyrant's Rampage.
entries: When the deathwalker reduces a creature to 0 hit points with a melee attack on its turn, the deathwalker can move up to half its speed and make a tail or slam attack.

bonus.name: Whiplash.
entries: The deathwalker whips its head and tries to throw a creature it is grappling with its bite attack. The target must succeed on a DC 25 Strength saving throw. On a failure, the target is hurled up to 60 feet in a direction of the Deathwalker's choice and lands prone, taking 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it was thrown. On a success, the target slips from the deathwalker's mouth and lands in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of it.

reaction.name: Bloodied Rage.
entries: When the deathwalker is reduced to half its hit point maximum or less, it immediately recharges and uses its Fearsome Roar.

legendary.name: Move.
entries: The deathwalker moves up to its speed without provoking attacks of opportunity.

legendary.name: Attack.
entries: The deathwalker makes a tail or slam attack.

legendary.name: Tyranny (Costs 2 Actions).
entries: The deathwalker makes a bite attack.

legendary.name: Rushing Fury (Costs 3 Actions).
entries: The deathwalker moves up to its speed in a straight line. During this movement, the deathwalker can move through the spaces of other creatures, and whenever it enters the space of another creature for the first time, it can make a slam attack against that creature.

legendaryHeader: The deathwalker can take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the options below. Only one legendary action can be used at a time and only at the end of another creature's turn. The deathwalker regains spent legendary actions at the start of its turn.

trait.name: Keen Hearing and Sight.
entries: The greatwing has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or sight.

trait.name: Swooping Strike.
entries: If the greatwing is flying and dives at least 20 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a beak attack, the target takes an additional 10 (3d6) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is knocked prone, the greatwing can make a beak attack against it as a bonus action.

action.name: Multiattack.
entries: The greatwing makes three beak attacks. It can replace a beak attack with a use of Wing Buffet.

action.name: Beak.
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) piercing damage. Instead of dealing damage, the greatwing can grapple a Medium or smaller creature (escape DC 15) with its beak. Until this grapple ends, the greatwing cannot make beak attacks.

action.name: Wing Buffet.
entries: The greatwing beats its wings while on the ground. Each Medium or smaller creature within 20 feet of the greatwing must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone. The greatwing can then fly up to half its speed.

reaction.name: Kick Up.
entries: In response to being attacked by a creature within 15 feet, the greatwing beats its wings, kicking up dirt and debris. The creature must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or subtract a d6 from any attacks it makes until the end of its turn, including the triggering attack (potentially causing it to miss).

Creatures that are immune to the blinded condition or perceive their surroundings through senses other than sight automatically succeed on their save. The greatwing must be on the ground to take this reaction.

trait.name: Blood Frenzy.
entries: The littlesnap has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its hit points.

action.name: Bite.
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.

trait.name: Blood Frenzy.
entries: The littlesnap swarm has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its hit points.

trait.name: Swarm.
entries: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny littlesnap. The swarm can't regain hit points or gain temporary hit points.

action.name: Bites.
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 0 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (4d6) piercing damage, or 7 (2d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer.

trait.name: Landblend.
entries: If the mammothmaw has been motionless for 1 hour or more, its stealth bonus is improved to +10.

trait.name: Lockjaw.
entries: When the mammothmaw uses its Massive Bite action, it is unable to open its mouth until it finishes a short or long rest, and its mouth cannot be forced open except by a DC 25 Strength check. If the mouth is successfully forced open, all creatures restrained by the mammothmaw's massive bite go free, exiting in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the mammothmaw.

If an attacker deals 30 slashing or piercing damage to the mammothmaw in a single turn, the attacker can open a hole in the mammothmaw's hide. While the hole is open, creatures restrained by the mammothmaw's massive bite can use an action to make a DC 18 Strength (Athletics) or Dexterity (Athletics) check to break free. On a success, a creature is no longer restrained and exits prone in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the mammothmaw.

action.name: Multiattack.
entries: The mammothmaw makes two tongue lash attacks and uses wild thrashing, if possible.

action.name: Tongue Lash.
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d6 + 8) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) acid damage.

action.name: Wild Thrashing (Recharge 5–6).
entries: The mammothmaw uses its bulk to crush creatures around it. All Large or smaller creatures within 5 feet of the mammothmaw must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (4d6 + 8) bludgeoning damage and falling prone on a failure, or taking half as much damage on a success.

action.name: Massive Bite (1/Day).
entries: The mammothmaw chooses a point within 10 feet to target with its massive bite. Huge or smaller creatures in a 15-foot radius from the chosen point must make a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, creatures are caught by the mammothmaw's massive bite, taking 36 (8d6 + 8) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) bludgeoning damage, and are trapped inside the mammothmaw's mouth. A creature inside the mouth is blinded and restrained, and it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the mammothmaw. Once the mammothmaw has used its Massive Bite action, it can only target creatures inside its mouth with its Tongue Lash attacks.

The mammothmaw can fit a maximum of eight Medium or smaller creatures, two Large creatures, or one Huge creature in its mouth. If the mammothmaw holds a creature in excess of these numbers, a random creature that was already in its mouth due to its Massive Bite is freed, landing prone in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of it.

trait.name: Ambusher.
entries: In the first round of a combat, the sailstalker has advantage on attack rolls against any creature it surprised.

trait.name: Keen Sight and Smell.
entries: The sailstalker has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight, hearing, or smell.

trait.name: Surprise Attack.
entries: If the sailstalker surprises a creature and hits it with an attack during the first round of combat, the target takes an extra 14 (4d6) damage from the attack.

trait.name: Swampland Camouflage.
entries: The sailstalker has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in swamp or marshlike terrain.

action.name: Multiattack.
entries: The sailstalker makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its tail. It can't make both attacks against the same target.

action.name: Bite.
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (4d10 + 6) piercing damage, and if the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 16). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the sailstalker can't bite another target.

action.name: Tail.
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage.

bonus.name: Aggressive.
entries: The sailstalker can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature that it can see.

bonus.name: Drown.
entries: If the sailstalker is in or adjacent to a body of water at least 5 feet deep, it can plunge a creature grappled by it into the water. The creature must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 15 (2d8 + 6) slashing damage on a failure, or half as much on a success. A creature that fails its saving throw begins to suffocate as water fills its lungs unless it can breathe underwater or does not need to breathe. A suffocating creature can repeat the Constitution saving throw at the end of subsequent turns, coughing up the water and no longer suffocating on a success. Alternatively, the creature can spend an action to cough up the water, ending the suffocation.

trait.name: Swamp Sneak
entries: The Glunch can hide as a bonus action in swampy terrain, and when it does, its stealth bonus is improved to +5.

trait.name: Ghost Coax
entries: The Glunch has advantage on ability checks and saving throws to interact with undead.

trait.name: Manylegs Speech
entries: The Glunch can communicate simple ideas, concepts, and emotions to insects, spiders, worms, and other bug-like creatures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Glunch makes two attacks: one with its spear and one with its spines.

action.name: Spear
entries: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage, or 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.

action.name: Spines
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage.

action.name: Blowgun
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 25/100 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.

trait.name: Swamp Sneak
entries: The Glunch can hide as a bonus action in swampy terrain, and when it does, its stealth bonus is improved to +5.

trait.name: Ghost Coax
entries: The Glunch has advantage on ability checks and saving throws to interact with undead.

trait.name: Manylegs Speech
entries: The Glunch can communicate simple ideas, concepts, and emotions to insects, spiders, worms, and other bug-like creatures.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Glunch makes two melee attacks: two with its lance or one with its shortsword and one with its spines.

action.name: Lance
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d12 + 3) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage.

action.name: Spines
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage.

action.name: Blowgun
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 25/100 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage plus 5 (2d4) poison damage, and the target must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or become paralyzed with manylegs toxin for 1 minute. A paralyzed creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of their turns, ending the paralysis on a success.

trait.name: Fire Frenzy
entries: If the horse-ape sees fire or smoke emitted from a flame within 60 feet of it, it flies into a rage, gaining the following effects until the end of its next turn.

items: The horse-ape has advantage on melee attack rolls
The horse-ape deals an additional 5 (1d10) damage when it hits with a weapon attack.
The horse-ape has disadvantage on Wisdom, Intelligence, and Charisma saving throws.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The horse-ape makes two fist attacks.

action.name: Fist
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Rock
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 30/60 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Trailmaker
entries: The iramuk's movement is unaffected by difficult terrain, and when the iramuk moves through terrain made difficult by snow, vegetation, or uneven ground, it becomes simple terrain.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The iramuk makes two attacks: one with its neck and one with its stomp.

action.name: Neck
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target that isn't prone. Hit: 23 (5d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage and the target must make a DC 17 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

action.name: Stomp
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one prone target or one Medium or smaller target. Hit: 33 (5d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The unembraced has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the unembraced's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

trait.name: Ascended Leadership
entries: If the unembraced can see an ally of a higher Challenge Rating within 60 feet, it adds 1d4 to its attack and damage rolls.

action.name: Dagger
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) piercing damage.

action.name: Poison Blowgun
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hit points, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.

action.name: Net
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, ranged 10/20 ft., one Medium or smaller creature. Hit: The target is restrained until it escapes the net. Any creature can use its action to make a DC 12 Strength check to free itself or another creature in the net, ending the effect on a success. Dealing 10 slashing damage to the net (AC 10) destroys the net and frees the target.

monster.name: Aspecter Warrior
languages: Kelodhrosian; the languages of any creature it has embraced

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The aspecter has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the aspecter's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

trait.name: Embraced Adaptation
entries: The aspecter has a burrow, swim, or climbing speed equal to half its walk speed (choose one).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The aspecter makes two attacks: one with its battleaxe and one with its embraced weapons.

action.name: Battleaxe
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage.

action.name: Embraced Weapons
entries: The aspecter has one or more of the following attack options, provided it has embraced the appropriate creature:

items: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage.

Claw. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) slashing damage, and the creature must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or lose 3 (1d6) hit points per turn due to heavy bleeding. Each time the aspecter hits the bleeding target with this attack, the damage dealt by the bleeding increases by 3 (1d6). Any creature can take an action to stanch the bleeding with a successful DC 10 Wisdom (Medicine) check. The bleeding also ends if the target receives magical healing.
Slam. Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage, and the creature must make a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
Spit. Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (3d6) acid damage.

monster.name: Aspecter Mystic
languages: Kelodhrosian; the languages of any creature it has embraced

trait.name: Embraced Adaptation
entries: The aspecter has a burrow, swim, or climbing speed equal to half its walk speed (choose one).

trait.name: Spellcasting
entries: The aspecter is a 4th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13, +5 to hit with spell attacks). The aspecter has the following sorcerer spells prepared:
Cantrips (at-will): fire bolt, ray of frost, chill touch
1st-level: burning hands, fog cloud, ray of sickness
2nd-level: hold person, scorching ray, shatter

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The aspecter makes two attacks: one with mystic bolt and one with its embraced magic.

action.name: Dagger
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Mystic Bolt
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) force damage.

action.name: Embraced Magic
entries: The aspecter has one or more of the following attack options, provided it has embraced the appropriate creature:

items: Arcane Bindings. The aspecter chooses a creature within 30 feet that it can see and attempts to magically bind it. The creature must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or take 7 (2d6) force damage and become restrained for 1 minute. A restrained creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of their turns, ending the effect on a success.
Burning Ray. Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) fire damage.
Noxious Touch. Melee Spell Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) poison damage.

monster.name: Hybrid Warrior Priest
languages: Kelodhrosian; the languages of any creature it has embraced

trait.name: Hybrid Adaptations
entries: The priest gains a fly, swim, or climbing speed equal to half its walk speed (choose two).

trait.name: Embraced Advantage
entries: The priest deals an additional 4 (1d8) damage when it hits a creature with a weapon attack, provided it has advantage on the attack roll.

trait.name: Blood Frenzy
entries: The priest has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its hit points.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The priest makes three attacks: one with each of its hybrid weapons.

action.name: Hybrid Weapons
entries: The priest has three of the following attack options, provided it has embraced the appropriate creature:

items: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage.
Claws. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) slashing damage.
Slam. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and the target must make a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
Tail. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
Gore. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) piercing damage.
Spike. Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, range 60/180 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage.

monster.name: Monoform Priest Template
entries: A monoform priest has taken on nearly all the aspects of a singular creature. A monoform priest is represented by the embraced creature's stat block with the following changes:

items: The creature's type changes to monstrosity.
The creature adds Kelodhrosian to known languages.
The creature's eyes are bright blue.

monster.name: Hybrid Mystic Priest
languages: Kelodhrosian; the languages of any creature it has embraced

trait.name: Hybrid Adaptations
entries: The priest gains a fly, swim, or climbing speed equal to half its walk speed (choose two).

trait.name: Spellcasting
entries: The mage is a 9th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). The mage has the following wizard spells prepared:
Cantrips (at will): chill touch, fire bolt, mage hand, ray of frost
1st level (4 slots): detect magic, fog cloud, shield
2nd level (3 slots): misty step, suggestion
3rd level (3 slots): counterspell, fireball, hypnotic pattern

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The priest uses three of its hybrid magic options. It cannot use the same option twice.

action.name: Hybrid Magics
entries: The priest has three of the following spell or attack options, provided it has embraced the appropriate creature:

items: Elemental Orb. Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 90 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) acid, cold, fire, or lightning damage (priest's choice).
Stormgrasp. Melee Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) lightning damage.
Corrosive Seeker. The priest chooses a creature that it can see within 60 feet. The creature must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) acid damage on a failure.
Mind-Venom. The priest chooses a creature that it can see within 60 feet. The creature must make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw, taking 13 (3d8) psychic damage on a failure.

monster.name: Archpriest Warrior
languages: Kelodhrosian; the languages of any creatures it has embraced

trait.name: Magic Diffusion
entries: The archpriest has resistance to damage dealt by spells, and when the archpriest fails a saving throw against a spell, roll a d6. If the result is a 4 or higher, the archpriest warrior instead succeeds.

trait.name: Apex Adaptations
entries: The archpriest gains a fly, swim, or climbing speed equal to its walk speed (choose two).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The archpriest makes three attacks, using each of its chosen weapons at least once.

action.name: Poisonous Breath
entries: Recharge 5-6. The archpriest exhales poisonous gas in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 35 (10d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Creatures that fail their saving throw by 5 or more are paralyzed until the end of the archpriest's next turn.

action.name: Chosen Weapons
entries: The archpriest has two or more of the following attack options, provided it has embraced the appropriate creature:

items: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 16).
Claws. Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (4d6 + 5) slashing damage.
Slam. Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage, and the target must make a DC 17 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
Tail. Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

monster.name: Archpriest Mystic
languages: Kelodhrosian; the languages of any creatures it has embraced.

trait.name: Apex Adaptations
entries: The archpriest gains a fly, swim, or climbing speed equal to its walk speed (choose two).

trait.name: Spellcasting
entries: The archpriest is an 11th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks). The archpriest can innately cast the following sorcerer spells, requiring no material components:
Cantrips (at-will): chill touch, mage hand, ray of frost, shocking grasp
1st-level (4 slots): detect magic, fog cloud, shield
2nd-level (3 slots): darkness, hold person, invisibility
3rd-level (3 slots): counterspell, fireball, slow
4th-level (3 slots): confusion, dimension door
5th-level (2 slots): cone of cold, hold monster

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The archpriest uses its paralyzing gaze. It then uses two of its chosen magic options. It cannot use the same option twice. In place of using a chosen magic, the archpriest can cast a spell of 2nd level or lower.

action.name: Paralyzing Gaze
entries: The archpriest targets one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. If the target can see the archpriest, the target must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed until the end of the archpriest's next turn.

action.name: Chosen Magic
entries: The priest has three spell or attack options, provided it has embraced the appropriate creature:

items: Acid Jet. Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, range 30 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (4d10 + 5) acid damage
Hurl Flame. Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, range 90 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (6d6 + 5) fire damage.
Ruinous Touch. Melee Spell Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 31 (4d12 + 5) necrotic damage.

trait.name: Maddening Presence
entries: When a creature starts their turn within 30 feet of the lost soul and can see it, the creature must make a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or become seized by a madness that lasts until the end of its turn. A maddened creature rolls a d6 to determine what it will do with its turn. On a 1-3, the creature does nothing. On a 4-5, the creature takes no action but spends its movement to move in a random direction, determined by a d8. On a 6, the creature takes an attack action against a random creature within reach (or does nothing if no creature is within reach).

trait.name: Rampage
entries: When the lost soul reduces a creature to 0 hit points with a melee attack on its turn, the lost soul can take a bonus action to move up to half its speed and make a bite attack.

trait.name: Excessive Adaptation
entries: The lost soul gains a burrowing, climbing, swimming, or flying speed equal to its walking speed (choose three).

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The lost soul makes one attack with each of the following weapons:

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 24 (5d6 + 7) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 17). While grappled, a target is restrained, and the lost soul cannot bite another target.

action.name: Rending Claws
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (6d4 + 6) slashing damage, and nonmagical armor worn by the target is partly shredded, taking a permanent and cumulative −1 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10.

action.name: Sapping Tendril
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage and the target must make a DC 18 Strength saving throw or have its movement speed reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Stinging Tail
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d6 + 7) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) poison damage and becoming poisoned for 1 hour on a failure, or taking half as much damage on a success.

trait.name: Divebomb
entries: If the madcrash moves at least 10 feet towards a creature and then hits it with a beak attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 2 (1d4) damage and the madcrash can use a bonus action to take the Disengage action and move up to half its speed.

action.name: Beak
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

trait.name: Echolocation
entries: The seatooth can't use its blindsight while deafened.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The seatooth can hold its breath for 2 hours.

trait.name: Keen Sight
entries: The seatooth has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The seatooth makes two bite attacks or makes a bite attack and uses Swallow.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (6d6 + 7) piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained and the seatooth can't bite another target.

action.name: Swallow
entries: The seatooth attempts to swallow a creature it is grappling. The target must succeed on a DC 19 Strength saving throw. On a failure, the target is swallowed, and the grapple ends. While swallowed, the target is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the seatooth, and it takes 14 (4d6) acid damage at the start of each of the seatooth's turns. A seatooth can have only one creature swallowed at a time. If the seatooth takes 25 damage or more on a single turn from the swallowed creature, the seatooth must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate the creature, which falls prone in a space within 10 feet of the seatooth. If the seatooth dies, a swallowed creature is no longer restrained by it and can escape from the corpse by using 15 feet of movement, exiting prone.

bonus.name: Frenzied Thrashing
entries: The seatooth violently thrashes a creature it is grappling. The creature must succeed on a DC 19 Constitution saving throw, taking 17 (3d6 + 7) slashing damage on a failure, or half as much on a success.

trait.name: Charge
entries: If the skullsmasher moves at least 20 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a ram attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 5 (2d4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

action.name: Ram
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Ambusher
entries: In the first round of a combat, the snakeneck has advantage on attack rolls against any creature it surprised.

trait.name: Baitball
entries: On its turn, the snakeneck can spend 80 feet of movement to create a vortex of swirling water in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point underwater that it can see within 20 feet. All other creatures in the sphere must make a DC 17 Strength saving throw. On a failure, a creature is drawn 20 feet towards the sphere's center and is restrained by the vortex until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature is drawn only 10 feet towards the sphere's center and is not restrained. Immediately after using this feature, the snakeneck can make two free bite attacks.

trait.name: Natural Camouflage
entries: The snakeneck has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks while underwater.

trait.name: Keen Hearing and Sight
entries: The snakeneck has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or sight.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The snakeneck makes two bite attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) piercing damage. If the target is Small or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw or be swallowed by the snakeneck. A swallowed creature has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the snakeneck, and it takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage and 7 (2d6) acid damage at the start of each of the snakeneck's turns. If the snakeneck takes 20 damage or more on a single turn from a creature inside it, the snakeneck must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw at the end of that turn or regurgitate all swallowed creatures, which fall prone in a space within 10 feet of the snakeneck. If the snakeneck dies, a swallowed creature can escape from the corpse by using 20 feet of movement, exiting prone.

bonus.name: Agile Swimmer
entries: The snakeneck dashes or disengages.

bonus.name: Dimlurk
entries: The snakeneck hides in dim light or darkness.

trait.name: Keen Senses
entries: The spider-raptor has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight, hearing, or smell.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The spider-raptor has advantage on an attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the spider-raptor's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

trait.name: Spider Climb
entries: The spider-raptor can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

trait.name: Standing Leap
entries: The spider-raptor's long jump is up to 25 feet and its high jump is up to 15 feet, with or without a running start.

trait.name: Pounce
entries: If the spider-raptor moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the spider-raptor can make one bite attack against it as a bonus action.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The spider-raptor makes three attacks: two with its claws and one with its bite.

action.name: Claws
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) slashing damage, or 13 (3d6 + 3) slashing damage if the target is prone.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12).

trait.name: Keen Sight and Smell
entries: The swiftclaw has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight or smell.

trait.name: Latching Claws
entries: If the swiftclaw hits a creature with two claw attacks on the same turn, it can latch onto the creature with its claws, moving into the creature's space. While latched onto a creature, the swiftclaw has advantage on attack rolls against the creature, but can only make bite attacks. The swiftclaw's speed also becomes 0, it can't benefit from any bonus to its speed, and it moves with the target. A creature can pry the swiftclaw off a latched creature by making a successful DC 13 Strength check as an action. On its turn, the swiftclaw can detach itself from the target (no action required), landing in an unoccupied space within 5 feet of the target. For every swiftclaw latched onto a Medium or smaller creature, the creature's movement speed is reduced by 15 feet. If this reduction reduces a creature's speed to 0, it falls prone and is restrained until its movement speed is greater than 0.

trait.name: Natural Camouflage
entries: The swiftclaw has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The swiftclaw has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the swiftclaw's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The swiftclaw makes three attacks: two with its claws and one with its bite. Alternatively, the swiftclaw makes two bite attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d4 + 5) slashing damage.

bonus.name: Swiftness
entries: The swiftclaw takes the Disengage action.

trait.name: Keen Sight
entries: The tentwing has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

trait.name: Swooping Strike
entries: If the tentwing is flying and dives at least 20 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a beak attack, the target takes an additional 4 (1d8) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is knocked prone, the tentwing can make a beak attack against it as a bonus action.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If the tentwing is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the tentwing instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

trait.name: Flyby
entries: The tentwing doesn't provoke opportunity attacks when it flies out of an enemy's reach.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The tentwing makes two beak attacks.

action.name: Beak
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage.

bonus.name: Quickflight
entries: The tentwing moves up to half its fly speed.

trait.name: Thick Skin
entries: Any bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage dealt to the thunderfoot is reduced by 5.

trait.name: Towering Presence
entries: A Large or smaller creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the thunderfoot or comes within 30 feet of it for the first time on its turn must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened until the start of its next turn. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the thunderfoot's Towering Presence for the next 24 hours.

trait.name: Quaking Movement
entries: The thunderfoot's movement creates tremors through the ground. When the thunderfoot comes within 20 feet of a large or smaller creature or moves while within 20 feet it for the first time on a turn, the creature must succeed on a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw or fall prone.

action.name: Stomp
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 52 (8d10 + 8) bludgeoning damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, it is knocked prone and grappled (escape DC 20). Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained and takes 10 (3d6) bludgeoning damage at the start of each of its turns. While grappling a creature in this way, the thunderfoot's speed is 0, and it can't use its stomp attack against another creature.

action.name: Tail
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 30 ft., three targets within 20 feet of each other. Hit: 32 (7d6 + 8) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) thunder damage and the target must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or be knocked prone. A creature that fails its saving throw by 5 or more is stunned until the end of its next turn.

bonus.name: Tremorstep
entries: The thunderfoot can spend 5 feet of movement to perform a tremorstep. Large or smaller creatures within 60 feet of the thunderfoot are subjected to the effects of its Quaking Movement feature. Any Large or smaller creatures within 10 feet of the thunderfoot take 14 (4d6) bludgeoning damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The trumpetcrest has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the trumpetcrest's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

trait.name: Keen Hearing and Sight
entries: The trumpetcrest has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or sight.

trait.name: Trampling Charge
entries: If the trumpetcrest moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a tail attack on the same turn, the target takes an additional 9 (2d8) bludgeoning damage and must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the trumpetcrest can make one stomp attack against it as a bonus action.

action.name: Tail
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Stomp
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one prone target. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage, and a Medium or smaller target is grappled (escape DC 14) until the trumpetcrest moves. Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained and takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage at the start of each of its turns. While grappling a creature in this way, the trumpetcrest's speed is 0, and it can't use its stomp attack against another creature.

action.name: Trumpet Call
entries: Recharge 5-6. The trumpetcrest lets out a long, droning distress call that is audible out to 600 feet, provided it can breathe. If the trumpetcrest is accompanied by a herd and any herd members are in the call's audible range, 1d4 trumpetcrests arrive in 1d4 rounds.

trait.name: Desperate Speed
entries: When the dire sloth takes damage, it can choose to double its walking and climbing speeds for 1 hour. At the end of the hour, the dire sloth takes 3 points of exhaustion.

trait.name: Hold Breath
entries: The dire sloth can hold its breath for 1 hour.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The dire sloth makes two claw attacks.

action.name: Claw
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (4d4 + 5) slashing damage.

trait.name: Ethereal Sight
entries: The ghost monkey can see 60 feet into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane, and vice versa.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The ghost monkey can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The ghost monkey uses Phantasmal Throw twice or makes two attacks: one with its claws and one with its bite.

action.name: Phantasmal Throw
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 60 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) necrotic damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) necrotic damage.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) necrotic damage.

action.name: Maddening Howl
entries: Recharge 5–6. The ghost monkey unleashes a curse-laced howl. Creatures that it can see within 60 feet that can hear the howl must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. Creatures that fail their saving throw are subjected to the effects of the confusion spell. Affected creatures can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of their turns, ending the effect on a success.

trait.name: Trampling Charge
entries: If the giant armadillo moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a bash attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the giant armadillo can make one stomp attack against it as a bonus action.

trait.name: Poorly Balanced
entries: While prone, the armadillo is also restrained. As an action, the armadillo can make a DC 15 Strength (Athletics) check to stand up from prone.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant armadillo makes two attacks: one with its tail and one with its bash.

action.name: Spiked Tail
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d6 + 7) piercing damage.

action.name: Bash
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (3d6 + 7) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Stomp
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (6d6 + 7) bludgeoning damage.
